# Giorgio Rivolta

> Official professional website of Giorgio Rivolta, a PMP-certified Project Manager with over 15 years of experience in IT, Cloud, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence and digital transformation.

Giorgio Rivolta is a Project Manager based in Italy.

He manages complex international projects, cross-functional teams, stakeholders, budgets, risks, priorities and delivery governance. His experience includes teams of more than 50 professionals and project budgets of up to €5 million.

His professional approach combines PMI and Scrum practices with collaborative leadership, people management, clear communication, conflict resolution and continuous improvement.

## Professional Profile

- [Giorgio Rivolta professional website](https://giorgio.rivolta.pro/): Official professional profile, work experience, skills, certifications and selected projects.
- [LinkedIn profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/giorgiorivolta/): Professional experience, qualifications and career information.
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/grivolta): Public repositories and technical projects.

## Core Expertise

- Project Management
- Project Management Professional, PMP
- PMI frameworks
- Scrum
- Stakeholder Management
- People Management
- Risk and budget management
- Digital Transformation
- IT Service Delivery
- Cloud Computing
- Data Analytics
- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning

## Technical Focus

- Microsoft Azure infrastructure: Expert
- Google Cloud infrastructure: Expert
- VMware infrastructure: Expert
- AWS infrastructure: Advanced
- SAP components: Advanced
- Data Analytics components: Advanced
- Machine Learning and AI infrastructure: Advanced

## Industries Served

- Banking
- Eyewear
- Energy
- Pharmaceuticals
- Transport
- Telecommunications

## Selected Projects

- [EnterCloudSuite](https://giorgio.rivolta.pro/#projects): Cloud management platform developed with a nine-person team, enabling customers to manage virtual machines through a graphical interface.
- [On-prem to Azure Cloud Migration](https://giorgio.rivolta.pro/#projects): Migration of 50 on-premises servers and 20 applications to Microsoft Azure with a global team of 14 professionals.
- [Procurement Data Hub](https://giorgio.rivolta.pro/#projects): Azure Data Platform integrating procurement data from SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Access and other sources, delivered with a team of 50 professionals.

## Certifications

- Project Management Professional, PMP
- Professional Scrum Master I, PSM I
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
- PMI Agile Certified Practitioner training
- Cisco Certified Network Associate
